stemHtml: On an aerodrome with parallel runways, how is the runway designation number supplemented?

options.a: For two parallel runways, by the letters "L" and "R" in sequence from left to right.
options.b: For three parallel runways, "L" for the leftmost, one "R" for the centre, and two "R" for the rightmost.
options.c: For two parallel runways, by adding 10 to the left runway designation and subtracting 10 from the right.
options.d: For three parallel runways, "L" and "R" for the outer runways with no supplement for the centre.
